title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Havells India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Havells India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Havells India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Havells India:
Havells India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Havells India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
